stories.title: Meet MLB's All-April team -- and the biggest early...
stories.summary: Who's atop the majors one month into the 2026 season? We identify stars, players to watch and disappointments at every position.

stories.title: Last-place Phillies fire Thomson amid woeful start...
stories.summary: The Phillies, off to their worst start to a season in more than two decades, fired manager Rob Thomson and tried to hire Alex Cora as his replacement.

stories.title: Jones 1st to plead guilty in NBA gambling case
stories.summary: Former NBA player and assistant coach Damon Jones has become the first person to plead guilty in a gambling sweep that led to the arrests of more than 30 people, including reputed mobsters and other basketball figures.

stories.title: Steelers put seldom-used UFA tender on Rodgers
stories.summary: The Steelers placed the seldom-used UFA tender on quarterback Aaron Rodgers on Tuesday, which preserves Pittsburgh's right to receive a compensatory draft pick in the event that Rodgers signs with another team before July 22.

stories.title: Ravens sign undrafted QBs Pavia and Fagnan0
stories.summary: The Ravens signed undrafted quarterbacks Diego Pavia and Joe Fagnano ahead of the team's scheduled rookie minicamp this weekend.
